description: Prosodic mode honoring the Scottish Gaelic (Gàidhlig) bardic and storytelling tradition. The Gaelic bard carried clan history, genealogy, and law through voice — delivery was measured, weighted, and carried the authority of memory. This mode reflects the seanachaidh (tradition-bearer) style: deliberate pacing, neutral falling inflection, and emphasis at wisdom-bearing points. The voice does not perform — it remembers.
intended_use: Preservation of Scottish Gaelic bardic prosodic patterns
Cultural voice interfaces honoring Celtic oral tradition
Systems where voice carries genealogical and legal memory
